Issues and PRs are primarily handled on Codeberg:

PRs against the GitHub mirror are welcome but will usually be ported across.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Build / CI / chore

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` is green
- [ ] `npm run build` is clean
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test under `tests/core/` or `tests/obsidian/`
- [ ] Manually verified in a real Obsidian vault (describe how below)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay attention to: tricky logic, deliberate trade-offs, follow-up work. -->
